sql_array: CREATE TABLE words (original String, stemmed String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original;
INSERT INTO words (original, stemmed) VALUES ('running', stem('en', 'running'));
UPDATE words SET stemmed = stem('en', original) WHERE original LIKE 'run%';
SELECT original, stem('en', original) AS stemmed FROM words WHERE original IN ('happiness', 'sadness', 'running');
SELECT arrayMap(x -> stem('en', x), ['narrative', 'visual', 'audiovisual']) AS results;
